actionUnits.condition: Simulate a water stream colliding with this object's BoxCollider to invoke IWaterInteractable.WaterHit(Vector3) on the attached MonoBehaviour (script guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d, class: Fire). Scene settings show: has BoxCollider (size 1.5,2.5,0.25), Has_Rigidbody: false, no EventTrigger listed, neighbors list empty, isOn = 0. Note: WaterHit requires a Vector3 parameter (normal) and is used to begin the turn-off timer; without the fire being ON first, no turn-off progression will occur.
Repeat water collision within maxHitInterval (2s) to keep isTurningOff active. Expected engine behavior: repeated WaterHit(normal) invocations under 2s gap.

Repeat water collision within maxHitInterval (2s). After totalHitTime (5s) of continuous hits while isOn == true, fire should turn off and UpdateFireState(true) should notify neighbors and FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1).
